title: seriphidium arbuscula var. longilobum
intro: Seriphidium arbuscula var. longilobum, also known as Wormwood Sage or Artemisia longiloba, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's extracts have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Seriphidium arbuscula var. longilobum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
